statistics/quantiles.name: quantiles
statistics/quantiles.description: Divide data into n continuous intervals with equal probability. Returns a list of n - 1 cut points separating the intervals. Set n to 4 for quartiles (the default). Set n to 10 for deciles. Set n to 100 for percentiles which gives the 99 cuts points that separate data into 100 equal sized groups. Raises StatisticsError if n is not least 1. The data can be any iterable containing sample data. For meaningful results, the number of data points in data should be larger than n. Raises StatisticsEr...

statistics/NormalDist/quantiles.name: quantiles
statistics/NormalDist/quantiles.description: Divide the normal distribution into n continuous intervals with equal probability. Returns a list of (n - 1) cut points separating the intervals. Set n to 4 for quartiles (the default). Set n to 10 for deciles. Set n to 100 for percentiles which gives the 99 cuts points that separate the normal distribution into 100 equal sized groups.
